/usr/bin/clang++  -Wno-register -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/CellLab.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/CellLab.dir/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/CellLab.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CellLab.dir/src/window/window.cpp.o -o CellLab  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
